category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Philippines EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入菲律宾：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入菲律賓：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Philippines BPS/PNS standards practice, DOE EVIDA charging-station rules, ERC/grid expectations, IEC connector compatibility, 60 Hz operation, EMC evidence, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与菲律宾 BPS/PNS 标准实践、DOE EVIDA 充电站规则、ERC/电网要求、IEC 接口兼容性、60Hz 运行、EMC 证据以及中国 GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與菲律賓 BPS/PNS 標準實務、DOE EVIDA 充電站規則、ERC/電網要求、IEC 接口相容性、60Hz 運行、EMC 證據以及中國 GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 基線的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BPS/PNS scope determination, DOE EVIDA registration or permitting decision, ERC grid-connection approval, customs determination, electrical-installation approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, operators, designers, and installers should verify current Philippines BPS, DOE, ERC, utility, electrical-code, radio, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BPS/PNS适用范围裁定、DOE EVIDA登记或许可决定、ERC并网批准、海关裁定、电气安装批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、运营方、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行菲律宾BPS、DOE、ERC、电力公司、电气规范、无线电及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BPS/PNS適用範圍裁定、DOE EVIDA登記或許可決定、ERC併網批准、海關裁定、電氣安裝批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、營運方、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行菲律賓BPS、DOE、ERC、電力公司、電氣規範、無線電及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering the Philippines, the main practical gaps are DOE EVIDA charging-station obligations, BPS/PNS or IEC 61851 evidence where specified by procurement or authorities, IEC 62196 connector interoperability rather than China GB/T 20234 hardware, 60 Hz grid operation, EMC testing for off-board EV supply equipment, and alignment from the China GB/T 18487 baseline. A blanket compulsory whole-unit BPS certification requirement for every EV charger model should not be assumed without confirming the current BPS technical-regulation scope.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造充电桩进入菲律宾时，主要实际差距包括 DOE EVIDA 充电站义务、采购或主管机关要求时的 BPS/PNS 或 IEC 61851 证据、采用 IEC 62196 接口互操作而非中国 GB/T 20234 硬件、60Hz 电网运行、非车载充电设备的 EMC 测试，以及从中国 GB/T 18487 基线进行对齐。不得在未核实现行 BPS 技术法规适用范围的情况下，假定每一型号充电桩均存在整机强制 BPS 认证要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造充電樁進入菲律賓時，主要實際差距包括 DOE EVIDA 充電站義務、採購或主管機關要求時的 BPS/PNS 或 IEC 61851 證據、採用 IEC 62196 接口互操作而非中國 GB/T 20234 硬體、60Hz 電網運行、非車載充電設備的 EMC 測試，以及從中國 GB/T 18487 基線進行對齊。不得在未核驗現行 BPS 技術法規適用範圍的情況下，假定每一型號充電樁均存在整機強制 BPS 認證要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, government gazette, utility, conformity assessment body, customs authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
